title: Doping Sn-based 2D Perovskite Semiconductor for Transistors and Thermoelectric Devices
author: Liu, Chen, et al.

steps.title: Before you begin
steps.instruction: The protocol below describes the specific steps for preparing and characterizing field-effect transistors (FETs) and thermoelectric devices (TEs) based on SnI4-doped (PEA)2SnI4 films.1.Check the oxygen and moisture level in the glovebox, it should be approximately or less than 0.1 ppm of H2O and 0.1 ppm of O2 level.2.The important materials for making (PEA)2SnI4 including phenethylammonium iodide, Tin(II) iodide and Tin(IV) iodide, etc. listed in the key resources table, should be stored in the glovebox preferably for less than three months.
